mapper.select: SELECT id, type_code AS typeCode, type_name AS typeName, severity_level AS severityLevel, default_penalty AS defaultPenalty, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM violation_types WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY severity_level ASC, id ASC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM violation_types
AND status = #{status}

SELECT id, type_code AS typeCode, type_name AS typeName, severity_level AS severityLevel, default_penalty AS defaultPenalty, description, status, created_at AS createdAt, updated_at AS updatedAt FROM violation_types WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM violation_types WHERE type_code = #{typeCode}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO violation_types (type_code, type_name, severity_level, default_penalty, description, status, created_at) VALUES (#{typeCode}, #{typeName}, #{severityLevel}, #{defaultPenalty}, #{description}, 1, NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE violation_types SET type_name = #{typeName}, severity_level = #{severityLevel}, default_penalty = #{defaultPenalty}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE violation_types SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
